notes: Updating my last report. The game now runs on potatoe mode with slightly better framerate on Proton 3.16-6, but still, only on windowed mode.
title: Lost in Vivo

notes: Runs in windowed mode only. For AZERTY keyboard (and other regions) add to launch options: LC_ALL=FR_fr %command%
title: Lost in Vivo

notes: Runs in windowed mode only. The option -screen-fullscreen 0 helps select Fullscreen mode (so you can use your native resolution). For AZERTY keyboard (and other regions) add to launch options: LC_ALL=FR_fr %command% -screen-fullscreen 0
title: Lost in Vivo

notes:
I was not able to launch through Steam. Running directly with wine resulted in very few textures loading.  


Current launch options look like this: PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command% -screen-fullscreen 0  


The issue appears to be with unsupported OpenGL calls, so likely you only need `PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1`.  


I was then able to launch through Steam, and the launcher works fine. I was able to select "Low" quality.
title: Lost in Vivo

notes: With Proton 4.2.1 the game now works fullscreen, but the performance is pretty terrible. At least with my low end hardware, but this game shouldn't be very demanding anyway.
title: Lost in Vivo

notes:
Game ran perfectly out of the box. 

I thought the sound was borked but it was just set super low in the games settings. I was able to raise the sound after playing the opening scene.
